title: StegVerse Candidate Bundle Reference
description: A reference identifying a candidate transition bundle for review. Does not grant install authority.

candidate_id.description: Unique identifier for this candidate reference

source_type.description: How the candidate bundle is located

source.description: URL or path to the candidate bundle zip

expected_sha256.description: Expected sha256 hash of the bundle zip

declared_transition_class.description: Declared class of transition this bundle represents

declared_stage.description: The StegVerse stage this bundle targets

authority_ref.description: Authority scope reference — must be scoped, not broad

operator_context.description: Optional operator context — informational only, does not grant authority
